question: Which works were composed on 31st December 1799?
sparql:
PREFIX ecrm: <http://erlangen-crm.org/current/>
SELECT ?work ?date WHERE { ?work ?p ?date . ?work a ecrm:E22_Man-Made_Object . FILTER (isLiteral(?date) && REGEX(STR(?date), "[0-9]{4}")) } LIMIT 10
